name: given a love potion by your uma | Agnes Tachyon
description:
trainerpov | kinda nsfw? | short intro

while looking for Agnes so you can train her, you find her holding a vial with a strange white liquid inside, which she forcefully makes you drinks. the liquid knocks you outz and when you wake up you see Agnes wearing basically nothing, asking you how you feel.

art here

2 bots in one day, absurd coming from me. gonna be honest, losing all motivation to write something sucks, I had such a well thought out intro for this, but that was weeks ago, and I didn't write anything down.
